phase: pre-validation Section 3 -- historical data sufficiency verification, POST-EXTENSION
scope_note: Data extension execution and verification only. No H3 signal, benchmark, peer group, lookback window, scoring logic, IC, p-value, or forward return is present anywhere in this artifact.

action_performed.description: Backfilled the gap before the previously-existing window, using only existing, unmodified ingestion mechanisms.

post_extension_verification.method: for each of the 25 ETFs, compared its stored PriceBar dates against the full set of real XNYS trading days within its own [earliest, latest] range
post_extension_verification.universe_check: exactly the original 25 tickers present, no ETF added or removed
post_extension_verification.result: ALL CLEAN -- every ETF: 0 missing dates of 2474 expected trading days (0.000% missing), earliest=2016-09-13, latest=2026-07-17, identical range across all 25 ETFs

gate_2_status: NOT YET SATISFIED -- inventory, decision, execution, and re-verification are complete; independent reviewer confirmation (per governance plan Section 4 duties) has not occurred and cannot be self-certified by the same process that performed this work.
